/assets/macaw/actions/000-idle_neutral.p.description: The robed traveler macaw stands upright at rest in a neutral idle pose, ready and waiting without handling an object.

/assets/macaw/actions/001-walk.png.description: The macaw takes a clear forward walking step with coordinated arms and feet, representing ordinary travel, strolling, or movement.

/assets/macaw/actions/004-turn_around.pn.description: The macaw pivots through the body to turn around and face the opposite direction, clearly showing a change of course.

/assets/macaw/actions/005-look_back.png.description: The macaw twists the head and upper body to look back over a shoulder, checking something behind while remaining in place.

/assets/macaw/actions/007-stand_up.png.description: The macaw rises from a lowered or seated posture to stand upright, bracing the body during the upward transition.

/assets/macaw/actions/008-sit_on_chair.p.description: The macaw sits naturally on a wooden chair with the body supported and feet lowered, suitable for resting or conversation scenes.

/assets/macaw/actions/009-kneel.png.description: The macaw lowers onto one knee in a stable kneeling pose, useful for examining, helping, honoring, or working near the ground.

/assets/macaw/actions/010-crouch.png.description: The macaw bends both knees and lowers the torso into a compact crouch, suggesting hiding, inspecting, or preparing to move.

/assets/macaw/actions/011-crawl.png.description: The macaw travels low on hands and knees in a crawling posture, suitable for tunnels, searching, stealth, or recovery.

/assets/macaw/actions/012-climb_down_lad.description: The macaw descends a ladder rung by rung while gripping it with both hands, clearly communicating downward climbing.

/assets/macaw/actions/013-jump_forward.p.description: The macaw launches forward in a jump with both feet off the ground and limbs extended in the direction of travel.

/assets/macaw/actions/014-land_after_jum.description: The macaw absorbs a landing after a jump with bent knees, lowered weight, and balanced arms at the moment of impact.

/assets/macaw/actions/015-fall_down.png.description: The macaw loses balance and falls toward the ground with an uncontrolled tilted body and outstretched limbs.

/assets/macaw/actions/016-get_up.png.description: The macaw pushes up from the ground and regains a standing position after falling, using hands and knees for support.

/assets/macaw/actions/017-trip.png.description: The macaw stumbles after catching a foot, pitching forward with arms reacting to prevent a complete fall.

/assets/macaw/actions/018-balance.png.description: The macaw carefully balances on an unstable footing with arms spread and weight centered to avoid falling.

/assets/macaw/actions/019-tiptoe.png.description: The macaw moves quietly on tiptoe with raised heels and cautious posture, suggesting stealth or an attempt not to disturb anyone.

/assets/macaw/actions/023-pick_up_object.description: The macaw bends toward a loose object and lifts it from the ground, clearly depicting the complete pick-up interaction.

/assets/macaw/actions/025-drop_object.pn.description: The macaw releases a held object so it falls freely from the hand, conveying an accidental or deliberate drop.

/assets/macaw/actions/026-place_object.p.description: The macaw carefully sets a held object onto a surface or marked location with controlled hands and attention.

/assets/macaw/actions/028-hold_object.pn.description: The macaw securely holds an object in both hands at torso height, presenting a neutral carrying or possession pose.

/assets/macaw/actions/030-receive_object.description: The macaw reaches forward with open hands to accept an object being offered by another character.

/assets/macaw/actions/032-catch_ball.png.description: The macaw catches an incoming ball with both hands and a braced stance, focusing on the object in mid-action.

/assets/macaw/actions/035-search_chest.p.description: The macaw leans over an open treasure chest and searches through its contents, looking for a useful item.

/assets/macaw/actions/036-close_door.png.description: The macaw pushes a hinged door shut with one hand, clearly showing the closing phase of a doorway interaction.

/assets/macaw/actions/037-knock_on_door..description: The macaw faces a closed door and raises a fist to knock, requesting attention or permission to enter.

/assets/macaw/actions/038-lock_door.png.description: The macaw secures a door lock using a key or locking mechanism, indicating that the entrance is being made inaccessible.

/assets/macaw/actions/039-unlock_door.pn.description: The macaw operates a door lock with a key to open access, clearly representing an unlocking interaction.

/assets/macaw/actions/043-press_button.p.description: The macaw extends one finger to press a visible button on a device or wall control, activating a mechanism.

/assets/macaw/actions/044-pull_lever.png.description: The macaw grips a mechanical lever and pulls it through its range, operating machinery, a switch, or a gate.

/assets/macaw/actions/046-ring_bell.png.description: The macaw rings a hand bell or mounted bell with a deliberate motion to signal, summon, or announce something.

/assets/macaw/actions/047-light_lantern..description: The macaw carefully ignites a lantern, bringing its warm light to life for darkness, travel, or exploration.

/assets/macaw/actions/048-extinguish_lan.description: The macaw puts out a burning lantern safely, removing the visible flame and ending its light.

/assets/macaw/actions/049-light_fire.png.description: The macaw kneels beside fuel and starts a small fire, using a flame or spark to ignite the kindling.

/assets/macaw/actions/050-extinguish_fir.description: The macaw deliberately smothers or douses a small fire until the flames go out, making the area safe.

/assets/macaw/actions/051-push_cart.png.description: The macaw leans forward with both hands against a loaded handcart, using body weight to push it along.

/assets/macaw/actions/052-pull_cart.png.description: The macaw walks ahead while pulling a handcart by its handle, transporting cargo behind the body.

/assets/macaw/actions/053-carry_bucket.p.description: The macaw carries a bucket by its handle at the side, keeping it upright while walking or working.

/assets/macaw/actions/054-pour_bucket.pn.description: The macaw tips a bucket forward with both hands so its contents pour onto a target area or container.

/assets/macaw/actions/055-pack_bag.png.description: The macaw places supplies into an open travel bag and arranges them for a journey, delivery, or departure.

/assets/macaw/actions/056-unpack_bag.png.description: The macaw removes stored items from an open travel bag, laying out supplies after arriving or preparing to work.

/assets/macaw/actions/059-answer_questio.description: The macaw responds to a question with an engaged speaking gesture, conveying a clear explanation or reply.

/assets/macaw/actions/060-nod_yes.png.description: The macaw nods the head affirmatively to communicate yes, confirmation, permission, or understanding.

/assets/macaw/actions/061-shake_head_no..description: The macaw turns the head side to side to communicate no, refusal, disagreement, or correction.

/assets/macaw/actions/062-agree.png.description: The macaw shows clear agreement with an approving expression and open affirmative gesture toward another speaker.

/assets/macaw/actions/063-disagree.png.description: The macaw visibly disagrees through a resistant hand gesture and skeptical posture without becoming aggressive.

/assets/macaw/actions/064-point_left.png.description: The macaw extends an arm and finger toward the left, giving a precise directional cue or indicating something off-screen.

/assets/macaw/actions/065-point_up.png.description: The macaw points clearly upward with one raised finger, indicating a higher location, skyward object, or important idea.

/assets/macaw/actions/066-point_down.png.description: The macaw points clearly downward toward the ground, a nearby object, or a lower level.

/assets/macaw/actions/067-point_at_self..description: The macaw points toward the own chest to mean me, identify the speaker, or volunteer personally.

/assets/macaw/actions/068-point_at_objec.description: The macaw extends a finger toward a nearby object, drawing attention to a specific item or target.

/assets/macaw/actions/069-beckon_come_he.description: The macaw curls an extended hand inward in a come-here beckoning gesture, inviting another character to approach.

/assets/macaw/actions/070-gesture_follow.description: The macaw motions forward and back toward the path ahead, signaling another character to follow along.

/assets/macaw/actions/071-gesture_wait.p.description: The macaw raises a steady hand in a wait or hold-on gesture, asking others to pause temporarily.

/assets/macaw/actions/072-gesture_stop.p.description: The macaw presents an open palm firmly toward the viewer in an unmistakable stop or do-not-proceed signal.

/assets/macaw/actions/073-wave_goodbye.p.description: The macaw raises one hand and waves goodbye, clearly communicating departure, leave-taking, or a friendly farewell.

/assets/macaw/actions/074-thank.png.description: The macaw expresses gratitude with a warm appreciative gesture, suitable for saying thank you after receiving help or a gift.

/assets/macaw/actions/075-apologize.png.description: The macaw adopts a remorseful posture and apologetic hand gesture, communicating regret and asking forgiveness.

/assets/macaw/actions/076-request_please.description: The macaw makes a polite requesting gesture with open hands, asking please for help, permission, or an item.

/assets/macaw/actions/077-warn_danger.pn.description: The macaw urgently warns of danger with an alarmed expression and emphatic pointing or raised-hand signal.

/assets/macaw/actions/078-explain.png.description: The macaw explains a topic with expressive teaching gestures, organizing information for another character to understand.

/assets/macaw/actions/079-demonstrate.pn.description: The macaw visibly demonstrates how to perform a task, showing a practical example with focused hands and attention.

/assets/macaw/actions/080-repeat_slowly..description: The macaw repeats a message slowly with measured gestures, emphasizing each part for clarity and comprehension.

/assets/macaw/actions/081-introduce_self.description: The macaw politely introduces themself by gesturing to the chest while greeting a new person.

/assets/macaw/actions/082-handshake.png.description: The macaw reaches out and shakes another character's hand in greeting, agreement, introduction, or partnership.

/assets/macaw/actions/083-high_five.png.description: The macaw raises an open hand to meet another character's palm in a celebratory high five.

/assets/macaw/actions/084-hug_friend.png.description: The macaw embraces a friend warmly with both arms, showing affection, reunion, support, or celebration.

/assets/macaw/actions/085-comfort_friend.description: The macaw gently consoles a distressed friend with a supportive touch and compassionate, attentive posture.

/assets/macaw/actions/086-help_friend_up.description: The macaw grips a fallen friend's hand and pulls them upward, clearly depicting practical assistance and recovery.

/assets/macaw/actions/087-hold_hands.png.description: The macaw holds hands with a companion in a calm supportive pose, suggesting trust, affection, or guidance.

/assets/macaw/actions/088-share_food.png.description: The macaw offers part of a meal to a companion, clearly depicting generosity and sharing food.

/assets/macaw/actions/089-share_object.p.description: The macaw presents a useful object for a companion to use jointly, showing cooperation and shared possession.

/assets/macaw/actions/090-exchange_items.description: The macaw and another character trade different items at the same time, representing barter or a mutual exchange.

/assets/macaw/actions/091-give_direction.description: The macaw gives travel directions with clear pointing and route-explaining gestures toward a destination.

/assets/macaw/actions/092-listen_to_frie.description: The macaw listens attentively to a speaking friend, facing them with patient focus and receptive body language.

/assets/macaw/actions/093-whisper_to_fri.description: The macaw leans close to a friend's ear and shields a quiet message, conveying private whispering or a secret.

/assets/macaw/actions/094-argue.png.description: The macaw argues with another character using tense posture and forceful opposing gestures during a disagreement.

/assets/macaw/actions/095-scold.png.description: The macaw reprimands another character with a stern expression and pointed admonishing gesture.

/assets/macaw/actions/096-congratulate.p.description: The macaw enthusiastically congratulates a companion with a joyful expression and celebratory gesture.

/assets/macaw/actions/097-welcome_guest..description: The macaw warmly welcomes an arriving guest with open arms and an inviting greeting posture.

/assets/macaw/actions/098-say_farewell.p.description: The macaw gives a sincere farewell before parting, with a gentle wave and emotionally clear leave-taking posture.

/assets/macaw/actions/099-dance_with_par.description: The macaw dances together with a partner in a coordinated social pose, showing shared rhythm and celebration.

/assets/macaw/actions/100-carry_injured_.description: The macaw supports and carries an injured companion, bearing their weight carefully during rescue or evacuation.

/assets/macaw/actions/101-protect_friend.description: The macaw places the body defensively between a friend and danger, shielding the companion with a protective stance.

/assets/macaw/actions/102-angry.png.description: The macaw shows anger through a hard glare, tense shoulders, and clenched hands while remaining in place.

/assets/macaw/actions/103-furious.png.description: The macaw displays intense fury with an explosive expression, forceful stance, and tightly clenched fists.

/assets/macaw/actions/104-afraid.png.description: The macaw recoils in fear with widened eyes, raised shoulders, and guarded hands in response to a threat.

/assets/macaw/actions/105-terrified.png.description: The macaw is overwhelmed by terror, shrinking back with a panicked expression and strongly defensive body language.

/assets/macaw/actions/106-worried.png.description: The macaw looks worried and preoccupied, holding a tense uncertain posture while anticipating a problem.

/assets/macaw/actions/107-nervous.png.description: The macaw fidgets nervously with uneasy hands and a hesitant stance, showing anxiety before an uncertain event.

/assets/macaw/actions/108-embarrassed.pn.description: The macaw appears embarrassed with an awkward averted gaze and self-conscious posture after an uncomfortable moment.

/assets/macaw/actions/109-ashamed.png.description: The macaw lowers the head and shoulders in shame, avoiding eye contact and expressing remorse or humiliation.

/assets/macaw/actions/110-disgusted.png.description: The macaw reacts with visible disgust, leaning away and grimacing at something unpleasant or offensive.

/assets/macaw/actions/111-proud.png.description: The macaw stands tall with chest lifted and a satisfied expression, clearly showing pride in an accomplishment.

/assets/macaw/actions/112-relieved.png.description: The macaw relaxes after tension, exhaling and lowering the shoulders with an unmistakable expression of relief.

/assets/macaw/actions/113-determined.png.description: The macaw faces forward with a focused gaze, squared stance, and firm resolve to complete a difficult task.

/assets/macaw/actions/114-suspicious.png.description: The macaw studies something with narrowed eyes and guarded posture, expressing doubt, mistrust, or careful suspicion.

/assets/macaw/actions/115-hungry.png.description: The macaw shows hunger by holding the stomach and looking longingly toward food or an expected meal.

/assets/macaw/actions/116-yawn.png.description: The macaw yawns widely while covering the beak, showing tiredness, boredom, or the need to sleep.

/assets/macaw/actions/117-sick.png.description: The macaw looks visibly unwell with a weak hunched posture, discomfort, and one hand supporting the body.

/assets/macaw/actions/118-faint.png.description: The macaw loses consciousness and collapses backward or downward in a clearly readable fainting motion.

/assets/macaw/actions/119-wash_hands.png.description: The macaw washes and rubs both hands with water and soap, depicting everyday hygiene and cleaning.

/assets/macaw/actions/120-comb_feathers..description: The macaw carefully combs and grooms the head feathers, performing personal care with a small comb.

/assets/macaw/actions/121-put_on_backpac.description: The macaw slides the arms into backpack straps and settles the pack onto the shoulders before travel.

/assets/macaw/actions/122-sleep_in_bed.p.description: The macaw sleeps peacefully under bedding with the head resting on a pillow, suitable for nighttime or rest scenes.

/assets/macaw/actions/123-mop_floor.png.description: The macaw cleans the ground with a long-handled mop, pushing it across the floor in a practical household task.

/assets/macaw/actions/124-wash_dishes.pn.description: The macaw washes plates or bowls with water and soap at a basin, clearly depicting kitchen cleanup.

/assets/macaw/actions/125-carry_tray.png.description: The macaw carries a serving tray level with both hands, transporting food, drinks, or dishes without spilling.

/assets/macaw/actions/126-take_out_trash.description: The macaw carries a tied bag of rubbish away for disposal, representing the everyday chore of taking out trash.

/assets/macaw/actions/127-chop_vegetable.description: The macaw uses a kitchen knife to chop vegetables on a cutting board while preparing a meal.

/assets/macaw/actions/128-mix_ingredient.description: The macaw stirs several cooking ingredients together in a bowl, combining them for a recipe.

/assets/macaw/actions/129-knead_dough.pn.description: The macaw presses and folds bread dough with both hands on a work surface, preparing it for baking.

/assets/macaw/actions/130-bake_bread.png.description: The macaw places or removes a loaf from a hot oven using safe baking tools, clearly depicting bread making.

/assets/macaw/actions/131-serve_food.png.description: The macaw presents a prepared plate or bowl of food to another person, table, or waiting guest.

/assets/macaw/actions/132-drink_water.pn.description: The macaw lifts a cup or vessel and drinks water, clearly representing thirst, refreshment, or hydration.

/assets/macaw/actions/133-chop_wood.png.description: The macaw swings an axe into a log or chopping block, splitting firewood with a controlled working stance.

/assets/macaw/actions/134-hammer_anvil.p.description: The macaw strikes heated metal on an anvil with a blacksmith's hammer, forging or shaping a tool.

/assets/macaw/actions/135-make_pottery.p.description: The macaw shapes wet clay into a vessel on a pottery wheel using both hands.

/assets/macaw/actions/136-weave_cloth.pn.description: The macaw works thread through a loom to weave cloth, clearly depicting textile making and craftwork.

/assets/macaw/actions/137-repair_machine.description: The macaw uses tools to inspect and repair a mechanical device, tightening or adjusting its exposed parts.

/assets/macaw/actions/138-sow_seeds.png.description: The macaw scatters or places seeds into prepared soil in an orderly planting action.

/assets/macaw/actions/139-hoe_soil.png.description: The macaw works the earth with a garden hoe, loosening soil and clearing a row for crops.

/assets/macaw/actions/140-harvest_crop.p.description: The macaw gathers mature crops from a cultivated field, collecting the harvest into a container.

/assets/macaw/actions/141-pick_fruit.png.description: The macaw reaches up to pluck ripe fruit from a branch and collect it carefully.

/assets/macaw/actions/142-feed_animal.pn.description: The macaw offers food to a nearby animal by hand or from a container, showing gentle daily care.

/assets/macaw/actions/143-plant_tree.png.description: The macaw places a young tree into a prepared hole and settles soil around its roots.

/assets/macaw/actions/144-buy_item.png.description: The macaw receives a selected market item from a seller as part of a purchase.

/assets/macaw/actions/145-sell_item.png.description: The macaw presents merchandise to a customer in a clear market or shop selling interaction.

/assets/macaw/actions/146-pay_coins.png.description: The macaw counts and hands over coins to complete a purchase, fee, debt, or reward.

/assets/macaw/actions/147-deliver_packag.description: The macaw carries and hands a wrapped parcel to its intended recipient, completing a delivery.

/assets/macaw/actions/148-write_letter.p.description: The macaw writes a message with pen and paper at a desk, composing a letter or note.

/assets/macaw/actions/149-sweep_street.p.description: The macaw cleans an outdoor street or path with a broom, gathering dirt and debris into a pile.

/assets/macaw/actions/150-read_aloud.png.description: The macaw holds an open book and reads its words aloud to listeners with an expressive speaking posture.

/assets/macaw/actions/151-study_notes.pn.description: The macaw reviews written notes closely, concentrating while learning, researching, or preparing an answer.

/assets/macaw/actions/152-teach_at_board.description: The macaw stands beside a teaching board and points to written material while explaining a lesson.

/assets/macaw/actions/153-use_compass.pn.description: The macaw holds and studies a navigation compass, checking direction before continuing a journey.

/assets/macaw/actions/155-follow_map.png.description: The macaw walks or pauses with an unfolded map, comparing the route to the surrounding landscape.

/assets/macaw/actions/156-track_footprin.description: The macaw crouches to inspect a trail of footprints, following clues left across the ground.

/assets/macaw/actions/157-climb_rope.png.description: The macaw climbs vertically up a rope using alternating hands and feet in a clear exertion pose.

/assets/macaw/actions/158-pitch_tent.png.description: The macaw assembles and raises a campsite tent using poles, fabric, and ground stakes.

/assets/macaw/actions/159-build_campfire.description: The macaw arranges firewood and kindling into a campsite fire before or while igniting it.

/assets/macaw/actions/160-ride_animal.pn.description: The macaw sits securely on a riding animal and holds the reins while traveling.

/assets/macaw/actions/161-limp.png.description: The macaw walks with an injured leg held or favored, showing an uneven painful limping gait.

/assets/macaw/actions/162-apply_bandage..description: The macaw wraps a bandage around the own injured limb, performing basic first aid.

/assets/macaw/actions/163-bandage_friend.description: The macaw carefully wraps a bandage around a companion's injury, providing first aid and care.

/assets/macaw/actions/164-call_for_help..description: The macaw cups hands around the beak and calls loudly for rescue, assistance, or attention.

/assets/macaw/actions/165-put_out_fire.p.description: The macaw fights a dangerous fire with water or firefighting equipment, urgently extinguishing the flames.

/assets/macaw/actions/166-draw_sword.png.description: The macaw pulls a sword from its sheath and brings it into a ready position before combat.

/assets/macaw/actions/167-sword_attack.p.description: The macaw steps forward and swings a sword in a committed offensive strike.

/assets/macaw/actions/168-sword_block.pn.description: The macaw raises a sword across the body to intercept and block an incoming attack.

/assets/macaw/actions/169-bow_and_arrow..description: The macaw aims a drawn bow with an arrow nocked, focusing on a distant target.

/assets/macaw/actions/170-guard_stance.p.description: The macaw holds a defensive combat stance with weapon ready, watching for danger while guarding an area.

/assets/macaw/actions/171-cast_spell.png.description: The macaw channels visible magical energy through an extended hand or focus to cast a spell.

/assets/macaw/actions/172-healing_magic..description: The macaw directs soft restorative magic toward an injury or companion, clearly communicating magical healing.

/assets/macaw/actions/173-magic_shield.p.description: The macaw summons a glowing protective barrier in front of the body to block danger or an attack.

/assets/macaw/actions/174-mix_potion.png.description: The macaw combines and stirs magical ingredients in a potion vessel, carefully brewing an alchemical mixture.

/assets/macaw/actions/175-open_magic_por.description: The macaw conjures a luminous circular portal with magic, opening a passage to another place.

/assets/macaw/actions/176-astronaut_floa.description: The macaw wears a spacesuit and floats freely in zero gravity with limbs drifting away from the body.

/assets/macaw/actions/177-astronaut_coll.description: The suited macaw gathers a scientific rock or soil sample with astronaut tools for later analysis.

/assets/macaw/actions/178-astronaut_oper.description: The suited macaw works at a spacecraft control console, pressing illuminated controls and reading instruments.

/assets/macaw/actions/179-astronaut_pilo.description: The suited macaw sits at spacecraft controls and actively pilots the ship using the flight console.
